**示例 2：**

**输入：** words = ["dog","racer","car"]

**输出：** [0,0,0]

def solve(words: Array[String]): Array[Long] = {

   val n = words.length

   if (n == 1) return Array(0L)

   val m = n - 1

   val lcp_pairs = new Array[Int](m)

   for (i <- 0 until m) {

      lcp_pairs(i) = lcp(words(i), words(i+1))

   }

   // compute prefix_max and suffix_max

   val prefix_max = new Array[Int](m)

   prefix_max(0) = lcp_pairs(0)

   for (i <- 1 until m) {

      prefix_max(i) = math.max(prefix_max(i-1), lcp_pairs(i))

   }

   val suffix_max = new Array[Int](m)

   suffix_max(m-1) = lcp_pairs(m-1)

   for (i <- m-2 downTo 0) {

      suffix_max(i) = math.max(suffix_max(i+1), lcp_pairs(i))

   }

   val answer = new Array[Long](n)

   for (i <- 0 until n) {

      if (n == 1) {

         answer(i) = 0L

         continue

      }

      if (n-1 < 2) {

         answer(i) = 0L

         continue

      }

      var max_lcp_part = 0

      if (i == 0) {

         if (m == 0) {

            max_lcp_part = 0

         } else {

            if (m >= 1) {

               max_lcp_part = suffix_max(1)

            } else {

               max_lcp_part = 0

            }

         }

      } else if (i == m) {

         if (m == 0) {

            max_lcp_part = 0

         } else {

            if (m >= 2) {

               max_lcp_part = prefix_max(m-2)

            } else {

               max_lcp_part = 0

            }

      } else {

         var part1 = 0

         if (i-2 >= 0) {

            part1 = prefix_max(i-2)

         var part2 = 0

         if (i+1 <= m-1) {

            part2 = suffix_max(i+1)

         max_lcp_part = math.max(part1, part2)

      // compute new_pair_lcp

      var new_pair_lcp = 0

      if (i > 0 && i < n-1) {

         new_pair_lcp = lcp(a, b)

      }

      answer(i) = math.max(max_lcp_part.toLong, new_pair_lcp.toLong)

   }

   answer

}

  def lcp(a: String, b: String): Int = {
    var len = 0
    while (len < a.length && len < b.length && a.charAt(len) == b.charAt(len)) len += 1

  }

  val n = words.length
  if (n <= 2) return Array.fill(n)(0L)

  val m = n - 1
  val prefixes = Array.fill(m)(0)
  for (j <- 0 until m) {
    prefixes(j) = lcp(words(j), words(j + 1))
  }

  val prefix_max = Array.fill(m)(0)
  var currentMax = 0
  for (j <- 0 until m) {
    currentMax = math.max(currentMax, prefixes(j))
    prefix_max(j) = currentMax
  }

  val suffix_max = Array.fill(m)(0)
  currentMax = 0
  for (j <- m - 1 to 0 by -1) {
    currentMax = math.max(currentMax, prefixes(j))
    suffix_max(j) = currentMax
  }

  val answer = Array.fill(n)(0L)
  for (i <- 0 until n) {
    var max_original = 0L
    if (i == 0) {
      if (m >= 1) {
        max_original = suffix_max(1).toLong
      }
    } else if (i == n - 1) {
      if (m >= 1) {
        max_original = prefix_max(m - 2).toLong
      }
    } else {

      val b = words(i + 1)
      new_pair_length = lcp(a, b).toLong
    }

    answer(i) = math.max(max_original, new_pair_length)
  }

  answer
}
